text: In this place, I feel a strange mix of curiosity and distance. The glass walls and echoing modernity leave me slightly removed from immediate human connection, as though the design amplifies my own sense of reflection. When facing the R+D wall, philosophical musings flicker between anticipation and uncertainty—a place meant for innovation, yet haunted by the ambiguity of what comes next. My mood is that of pensive expectation, caught between clinical detachment and the subtle stirrings of hope or apprehension.
